policy.scope: Read-only first-wave reference repositories cloned under references/.
policy.tracking: references/* is ignored; references/manifest.json is the tracked catalog.
policy.pinning: Each entry records the exact shallow-clone HEAD observed at pinnedAt.

references.name: porymap
references.head: 26b919d7ff4b54152de010abd5bf344af2ebe116

license.notes: Local license text is GNU Lesser General Public License v3.

references.usage: Map editor and project-layout reference for Gen III ROM hacking workflows.
references.risk: LGPL obligations apply if code is copied or linked; keep as a read-only behavioral and UX reference unless legal review approves reuse.

references.name: poryscript
references.head: ae917083df2b4a86be11a1bb308eef2cacb5222c
references.usage: Scripting language/compiler reference for Pokemon disassembly projects.
references.risk: Compiler semantics may be project-specific; prefer conceptual reference and verify compatibility before adopting syntax or generated output assumptions.

references.name: porytiles
references.head: 689ca12c92731214d3730e802d87f2525dbfc3f7
references.usage: Tileset compiler and asset-pipeline reference for metatile workflows.
references.risk: Default branch is develop, so APIs and file formats may be less stable than a release branch; keep the commit pin when comparing behavior.

references.name: pokeemerald-expansion
references.head: 7377e8839681e75d083cffd9e8a6f74737f7528b

detectedFrom: no root license file found locally
license.notes: No repository-level license was detected in the shallow checkout.

references.usage: Large feature-expansion reference for modernized pokeemerald mechanics, data structures, and content organization.
references.risk: No detected repository license; treat as read-only reference only. Large upstream surface may include generated or third-party assets.

references.name: hex-maniac-advance
references.head: 877e3e5b58fd83c41303fec15d1d049b2f6901b4
references.usage: ROM inspection and editing UX/reference implementation for GBA Pokemon data discovery.
references.risk: Editor behavior can encode assumptions about ROM variants; validate against target ROM formats before borrowing parsing logic.

references.name: rompatcher-js
references.head: e90a62f256e4e69a9c52d7d8f8ea8679bd27fae2

license.notes: Local license file is MIT; GitHub repository metadata returned NOASSERTION.

references.usage: Browser patching reference for IPS/BPS/UPS and related ROM patch workflows.
references.risk: Patch formats are security-sensitive binary parsers; keep fuzzing/error handling in mind before reusing logic.

references.name: mgba
references.head: b19b557a78930ede7ee7f5dcbc880f9ff2533ffe

license.notes: Local license file is Mozilla Public License 2.0.

references.usage: Emulator architecture, debugging, and test-runner reference for GBA behavior.
references.risk: MPL file-level copyleft obligations apply to copied source; repository includes substantial emulator code and bundled license notices.

references.name: pokeruby
references.head: 63a8cbf0016b351a4e68f7036fa0b77e23d2f2c1

detectedFrom: no root license file found locally
license.notes: No repository-level license was detected in the shallow checkout.

references.usage: Canonical Pokemon Ruby disassembly reference for source layout, build flow, and data representation.
references.risk: No detected repository license and likely copyrighted game-derived material; use only as read-only interoperability/reference material.

references.name: pokemon-game-editor
references.head: 441ff797499bd0e9b6c18f0f7493185ca001e908

license.notes: Custom local license; GitHub repository metadata returned NOASSERTION.

references.usage: Legacy Pokemon ROM editor reference for data tables, UI affordances, and import/export behavior.
references.risk: Custom restrictive license and checkout warning for case-colliding generated obj files on case-insensitive filesystems; do not copy code without review.
